title: echinochloa crus-galli subsp. utilis
intro: Echinochloa crus-galli subsp. utilis, also known as Japanese barnyard grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Echinochloa crus-galli subsp. utilis include reducing fever, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, decoction, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
